content.text: I'll read all the frames first.

[
{"ruleId":"V1","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"The amber probe arrow is the clear single focus in each frame, with the periwinkle candidates and lilac score bars playing supporting roles.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V2","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"The scene holds one probe, four candidates, and their score bars as a single coherent system, not five unrelated novel ideas.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V3","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"Labels 'probe', c1–c4 sit on the arrows and directly above each score bar; there is no legend or corner key.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V4","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"Only the instruction line and object labels/readouts appear, each annotating a visible element.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V5","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"Labels, the probe angle readout, and the numeric dot-product readouts are all legible at every viewport including 375px.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V6","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"All arrows, bars, and readouts sit fully within the frame with margins at 375, 768, and 1280.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V7","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"The 'probe' text and angle readout sit beside the probe shaft and remain readable without illegible overlap of other elements.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V8","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"The probe is consistently amber, candidates periwinkle, score bars lilac, and labels cream throughout all states.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V9","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"Every element—probe, candidates, bars, readouts, baseline—carries propositional content; no ornaments present.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V10","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"Initial shows probe at 90°, aligned shows probe on c1 at 20° with c1 bar peaking at +100, orthogonal shows probe at 110° on c3 with c1 at 0 and c3 peak, anti-aligned shows probe at 200° with c1 at -100 below the baseline.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V11","pass":true,"severity":"advisory","evidence":"Each score bar and numeric readout sits directly under its labeled candidate, and the probe readout touches the probe.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V12","pass":true,"severity":"advisory","evidence":"Across the driven states the probe rotation and bar heights change continuously, reading as a morph rather than a cut.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V13","pass":true,"severity":"advisory","evidence":"The composition keeps clear margins and separates the vector dial from the score bars with ample negative space.","suggestion":""}
]
